channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jazz lose heartbreaker to Indiana, 112-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz could not hold a 12-point lead in the final six minutes, and lose to the Indiana Pacers Monday night at the Delta Center, 112-111.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chiefs' Butker enters his 5th Super Bowl confident in his kicking and his beliefs
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Kansas City Chiefs kicker Harrison Butker, who tends to be talkative on the subject of his Christian faith, briefly went silent on Monday night when he was asked, “What do you think about gays?” “I understand that this is a great evening and we’re here to focus on the game,” Butke
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 16 Kansas shuts down No. 8 Iowa State in desperation game for both teams in the Big 12 race
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — Kansas had just turned the ball over in the first half against Iowa State on Monday night when it suddenly popped loose again along the sideline, and Jayhawks guard Dajuan Harris Jr. made perhaps the hustle play of the game.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs and Eagles handle the Super Bowl opening night spectacle like they've been here, done that
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Patrick Mahomes treated Super Bowl opening night like a two-minute drill, providing rapid-fire answers to one question after another. Travis Kelce passed on an inquiry about popping the question to Taylor Swift. Been here, done that.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: De’Aaron Fox trade is familiar for Kings interim coach Doug Christie
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Kings interim coach Doug Christie knows what it feels like to be traded midseason. That's because it happened to him, in Sacramento, where he spent the majority of his playing career.
item.dc:creator: TYLER MASON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles' Jalen Hurts showcases controversial cleats upon arrival in New Orleans
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles star quarterback Jalen Hurts wore a sweatshirt featuring the cleats he was disciplined over as he arrived in New Orleans on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams' Cooper Kupp says team will look to trade him in offseason
item.description: Los Angeles Rams star wide receiver Cooper Kupp revealed on Monday he will be made available for trade in the offseason. He's spent his entire career in L.A.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caleb Williams voted GQ's most stylish football player
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams has earned his first accolade since joining the NFL as the league's No. 1 overall pick last April. He took home GQ's fan vote for the Most Stylish Football Player Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: President Trump welcomes Florida Panthers to the White House
item.description: The Florida Panthers were the first professional championship team to be celebrated at the White House under the new Trump administration on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl might hinge on middle men as Chiefs, Eagles prep for opponent's fierce interior pass rush
item.description: Once Josh Allen backpedaled from the shotgun snap after the Buffalo Bills had just gone ahead of Kansas City, this crucial 2-point conversion play late in the third quarter of the AFC championship game quickly turned into chaos.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs' DeAndre Hopkins sends inspirational message before 1st Super Bowl appearance
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver DeAndre Hopkins fired off an inspirational message to struggling kids ahead of his first Super Bowl appearance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FOX Super 6 Super Bowl LIX gives NFL fans shot at $1 million
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles will meet in Super Bowl LIX. NFL fans will have a shot at $1 million with the FOX Super 6 Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Special Coverage: NFL world descends on New Orleans for Super Bowl LIX
item.description: As the two camps set up for a week in New Orleans, fans and NFL insiders flood the streets in search of a good meal and some inside tips on who will host a victory parade next week.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Southern Cal drops to No. 7 after loss; UCLA, South Carolina, Notre Dame remain atop women's Top 25
item.description: Southern Cal's second loss of the season dropped the Trojans to seventh in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll Monday. The previously No. 4 Trojans were shocked in Iowa when the Hawkeyes beat them 76-69 Sunday on a day Caitlin Clark's jersey was retired.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs great Jim Tyrer and the debate surrounding his place in the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs great Jim Tyrer's candidacy for the Pro Football Hall of Fame has stirred a debate between his success on the field and his tragic end.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Doncic releases emotional farewell message to Dallas after trade sends him to Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic released an emotional farewell to Dallas on Sunday, the same day a trade sending him from the Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers in a swap for fellow All-NBA player Anthony Davis was finalized.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chase Elliott wins Clash at Bowman Gray and sets sights on following it with Daytona 500 victory
item.description: NASCAR returned to its roots with a fight-free preseason exhibition at Bowman Gray Stadium and a popular victory with Chase Elliott winning The Clash on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cade Cunningham's 22 points and 15 assists lead Pistons over Bulls 127-119
item.description: Cade Cunningham had 22 points and 15 assists as the Detroit Pistons defeated the Chicago Bulls 127-119 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bulls trade Zach LaVine to Kings
item.description: The Chicago Bulls are trading star shooting guard Zach LaVine to the Sacramento Kings, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, NewsNation

item.title: Jey Uso set to headline WrestleMania Vegas as outrage over Royal Rumble divides fans
item.description: Jey Uso won the 2025 over-the-top-rope battle royal, featuring 30 wrestlers in what may have been one of the most stacked Royal Rumble matches ever.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Veteran invites Navy friends to run Carlsbad Marathon
item.description: When most old buddies reconnect they grab a bite to eat. Ryan Le and his friends, however, they go for a run.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Iowa honors Caitlin Clark by retiring her number and hanging it in the rafters
item.description: Clark returned to Iowa’s Carver-Hawkeye Arena on Sunday to have her number 22 retired in a ceremony after the Hawkeyes’ 76-67 win over No. 4 USC, one season after she completed her historic college career.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Drew Brees serves up pickleball to beloved New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS - Drew Brees had his fair share of fun in New Orleans, taking the Saints to football heaven. Now. the future Hall of Famers found a second line of work, quarterbacking one of the fastest growing sports in America. "Look. I'm a sports junkie, right? I love ping pong. I love tennis.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: South Carolina retires jersey number of three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson
item.description: Three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson's South Carolina No. 22 jersey was hung in the rafters Sunday at Colonial Life Arena, her college home court that already features a statue of the program’s all-time leading scorer outside the main entrance.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Stunning trade sends Luka Doncic to Lakers, Anthony Davis to Mavericks
item.description: In what is one of the more surreal trades in the history of professional sports, the Los Angeles Lakers have sent away one of its franchise legends in exchange for a young superstar.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Meet the puppies representing San Diego in 2025 Puppy Bowl
item.description: Just ahead of the Super Bowl LIX matchup between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles, the Puppy Bowl XXI kicks off Super Bowl Sunday with a morning competition between hundreds of rescue puppies.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes fall to Oklahoma State, 81-72
item.description: STILLWATER, Okla. (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes are finding life on the road in the Big 12 tough in their first season in the conference.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Baseball Ethan Nunez gears up for sophomore year
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Just a year ago, Ethan Nunez had no college offers. Now, the Colorado Mesa infielder holds one of the highest honors in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference (RMAC). “I couldn’t believe it, honestly,” Nunez said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bolts' Geekie turning heads with unique pregame rituals
item.description: To steal a line from Michael Scott in "The Office," Conor Geekie isn't superstitious, but he is a little "stitious.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bill Walton to be honored at San Diego Gulls game with bobblehead giveaway, specialty jerseys
item.description: The San Diego Gulls will honor NBA legend Bill Walton at their game against the Toronto Marlies on Friday night, with the first 8,000 fans receiving a Bill Walton bobblehead.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Courtney Vandersloot expected to sign with Chicago Sky
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Courtney Vandersloot, a former multi-time all-star and WNBA champion with the Chicago Sky, is expected to return to the franchise, according to the Chicago Sun-Times' Annie Costabile.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Scottie Scheffler felt frustrated sitting at home for two tournaments he normally plays while recovering from glass puncturing the palm of his right hand while making ravioli. A big part of him was thankful the injury wasn't worse.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
